title: Citrusy, Viscous American Almonds Bowl
description: A comforting and citrusy American dish featuring ground almonds, low in calories and rich in flavor.
instructions: Preheat the stone bowl over medium heat for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the orange juice, honey, ginger puree, and a pinch of salt.
Add the ground almonds to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the cinnamon powder and stir to combine.
Pour the unsweetened almond milk into the bowl and stir to combine.
Heat the grapeseed oil in the stone bowl over medium heat.
Pour the almond mixture into the stone bowl and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced almonds to the bowl and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the lemon zest and fresh mint leaves.
Serve the Citrusy, Viscous American Almonds Bowl immediately, garnished with additional sliced almonds and a sprinkle of cinnamon powder if desired.
Repeat the process for each serving.
